title: Lulu and the Moonhush
cover_prompt: A tiny, round creature with soft silver fur curled in a crescent moon’s glow, nestled in a bed of glowing dandelion fluff. The night sky is painted in deep blues and purples, with scattered stars twinkling like fireflies.
lyrics:
[verse]
Mmm ooh laa luu
Shaa naa noo noo
Tss pff haa haa
Mmm ooh laa luu

[verse]
Hmm eeh daa daa
Luu sha sha shh
Ooh naa naa naa
Hmm eeh daa daa

[verse]
Aah mmm shh shh
Pff luu luu luu
Mmm ooh laa laa
Aah mmm shh shh

---
style_prompt: Gentle folk lullaby, warm female vocal, fingerpicked acoustic guitar, 64 BPM, pastoral, settling, peaceful, evening atmosphere, descending melody phrases, each verse quieter, conversational singing, the world going to sleep, fingerpicked acoustic guitar accompaniment

character.name: Lulu
character.identity: A small, silver-furred dreamweaver who hums the night into stillness.
character.special: Her voice carries the quiet of the moon, wrapping the world in soft echoes.

about: A whispering lullaby that mirrors the gentle descent of evening, where each verse settles lower like moonlight fading into dusk. The soft, descending sounds guide little ones into sleep by reflecting the world’s quiet rhythm.
